title: DDecadent Wholesome Roasted Ripe Bananas Pancake
description: This anti-inflammatory-friendly dish combines the sweet and creamy roasted ripe bananas with a mantecare-emulsify pancake batter to create a unique and flavorful breakfast treat.

ingredients.name: ripe banana
ingredients.notes: ensure they are overripe for the best flavor

instructions: Slice the ripe bananas into thin rounds and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle ground cinnamon and nutmeg powder over the sliced bananas, then drizzle with oil and lightly toss until evenly coated.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes or until slightly browned and caramelized.
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, coconut milk, unsalted butter, and blend well using an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth and creamy.
Fold roasted bananas into the batter gently, making sure not to overmix.
Grease two non-stick frying pans with oil or butter. Pour equal portions of pancake mixture onto each pan, cooking for about 2 minutes per side or until golden brown.
Serve warm and enjoy your DDecadent Wholesome Roasted Ripe Bananas Pancake.
